basic_details.short_information: The Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 22 Home Guards. Candidates with Any Graduate Can Apply Online. basic_details.application_mode: Online only at APSC Recruitment portal

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a Government-recognised University

how_to_apply: Applicants must apply online only through the APSC recruitment website: https://apscrecruitment.in.
New users have to complete One Time Registration (OTR) first by clicking on “Register Here” and providing basic details.
Use a valid and active email ID and mobile number for registration and future communication.
Log in with registered email/mobile number and password, then fill in all mandatory details in the online application form.

Upload required documents: proof of Date of Birth, educational qualification certificates and mark sheets, caste/category certificates, BPL/PwBD certificates (if applicable) in PDF format (max 4 MB, scanned at 200 dpi, legible).
Upload recent passport-size Photograph and Signature (50 KB–200 KB each, photo not older than 3 months).
Carefully review all details and documents using the Preview option and tick the declaration checkbox before final submission.
Pay the applicable application fee and processing charges online; applications without successful fee payment will be treated as incomplete.
In case of payment failure or pending status, use “Check Status” to verify with bank/GRAS; double debit, if any, will be auto-refunded by the bank within 5–7 working days.
After final submission, take a printout of the submitted Online Application Form and retain it for future reference.
Candidates can also submit applications through Common Service Centres (CSCs) if they do not have their own online payment facility.

After creating an account, log in with credentials and fill in all required registration and application details carefully; mandatory fields are marked with an asterisk (*).

Proceed to pay the applicable application fee/processing charges online; in case of payment failure or pending status, use the “Check Status” option to verify with bank/GRAS.

Take a print-out of the submitted online application form and keep it safely for future reference and interview/document verification.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in 7th CPC Pay Matrix; Initial Pay Rs. 19,900/-

selection_process: CBT-1 (75 marks) + CBT-2 (Part A: 100 marks + Part B: 75 marks qualifying) + CBAT + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official websites of participating RRBs (listed at Para 13.7 of the CEN). Hard copy / offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs.). Candidates must first create an account on the RRB portal. Those who created an account for CENs notified in 2024/2025 should use the same credentials. Details filled in the "Create an Account" form (including mobile number, email ID) and the chosen RRB cannot be modified at any stage after account creation. Candidates can apply to only one RRB and submit only one application - multiple applications to the same or different RRBs will result in rejection of all applications and debarment from future RRB/RRC exams. Aadhaar or DigiLocker authentication is strongly advised during account creation for a smoother recruitment process. A live photograph is captured during the online application; pre-existing photographs are not accepted. No documents need to be uploaded at application stage (except signature and SC/ST certificate for free travel pass, if applicable).
seo_tags: Railway Recruitment Boards Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: NIT Surathkal Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 84 Assistant Professor, Professor and Associate Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: NIT Surathkal Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 84 vacancies across Karnataka. Candidates with Masters Degree, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 04-05-2026, and closes on 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Surathkal website, nitk.ac.in
basic_details.application_mode: Online only through NITK recruitment portal

qualification.education_qualification: As per department: First Class UG & PG in relevant discipline and PhD in desired specialization (with specified relaxations for direct PhD, integrated programmes)

selection_process: Institute reserves right to limit number of candidates based on academic brilliance, experience and departmental needs; decision of Institute will be final and binding.
how_to_apply: Visit the official website of NITK Surathkal and click on the faculty recruitment link available on the homepage (recruitment portal).
Register on the recruitment portal with a valid email ID and mobile number, then log in to access the online application form.
Fill in all required personal, academic, and experience details carefully; ensure eligibility as per department and post applied for.

Upload all relevant documents: identity proof, proof of date of birth, academic mark sheets and degree certificates (UG, PG, PhD), category certificates (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS/PwD), experience certificates and salary slips, publications list (SCOPUS/Web of Science), proof of projects, patents, PhD guidance, administrative roles, outreach, awards, etc.
Pay the non-refundable application processing fee (as per category) via NEFT/RTGS/online transfer to the specified NITK bank account and upload proof of payment in PDF format.
Download, hand-fill and sign the mandatory “Attestation Form” (Annexure II), then upload the scanned copy in the portal.
Candidates in Government/Quasi Govt/Universities/PSUs must upload No Objection Certificate or Self Declaration (Annexure I) and provide Vigilance Clearance Certificate at the time of interview.
Verify all details and documents in the online form and then click on “Submit” to complete the application process.
After successful submission, download and save the PDF of the completed application form for future reference.
At the time of interview, candidates must produce the printed application form, original Attestation Form, and all original supporting documents along with self-attested copies.
seo_tags: NIT Surathkal Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 84 Assistant Professor, Professor and Associate Professor Posts

basic_details.short_information: RRB Recruitment 2026 offers 11,127 vacancies for Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) posts. Eligible candidates with Diploma, ITI, B.E/B.Tech can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 through the official RRB website, rrbapply.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Railways, Government of India (Various Zonal Railways)

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in 7th CPC Pay Matrix; Initial Pay Rs. 19,900/-

selection_process: CBT-1 (75 marks) + CBT-2 (Part A: 100 marks + Part B: 75 marks qualifying) + CBAT + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official websites of participating RRBs (listed at Para 13.7 of the CEN). Hard copy / offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs.). Candidates must first create an account on the RRB portal. Those who created an account for CENs notified in 2024/2025 should use the same credentials. Details filled in the "Create an Account" form (including mobile number, email ID) and the chosen RRB cannot be modified at any stage after account creation. Candidates can apply to only one RRB and submit only one application - multiple applications to the same or different RRBs will result in rejection of all applications and debarment from future RRB/RRC exams. Aadhaar or DigiLocker authentication is strongly advised during account creation for a smoother recruitment process. A live photograph is captured during the online application; pre-existing photographs are not accepted. No documents need to be uploaded at application stage (except signature and SC/ST certificate for free travel pass, if applicable).

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in 7th CPC Pay Matrix; Initial Pay Rs. 19,900/-

selection_process: CBT-1 (75 marks) + CBT-2 (Part A: 100 marks + Part B: 75 marks qualifying) + CBAT + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official websites of participating RRBs (listed at Para 13.7 of the CEN). Hard copy / offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs.). Candidates must first create an account on the RRB portal. Those who created an account for CENs notified in 2024/2025 should use the same credentials. Details filled in the "Create an Account" form (including mobile number, email ID) and the chosen RRB cannot be modified at any stage after account creation. Candidates can apply to only one RRB and submit only one application - multiple applications to the same or different RRBs will result in rejection of all applications and debarment from future RRB/RRC exams. Aadhaar or DigiLocker authentication is strongly advised during account creation for a smoother recruitment process. A live photograph is captured during the online application; pre-existing photographs are not accepted. No documents need to be uploaded at application stage (except signature and SC/ST certificate for free travel pass, if applicable).

basic_details.job_title: RRB ALP (CEN 01/2026) Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 11,127 Assistant Loco Pilot Posts
basic_details.short_information: RRB Recruitment 2026 offers 11,127 vacancies for Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) posts. Eligible candidates with Diploma, ITI, B.E/B.Tech can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 through the official RRB website, rrbapply.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Railways, Government of India (Various Zonal Railways)

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-2 in 7th CPC Pay Matrix; Initial Pay Rs. 19,900/-

selection_process: CBT-1 (75 marks) + CBT-2 (Part A: 100 marks + Part B: 75 marks qualifying) + CBAT + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official websites of participating RRBs (listed at Para 13.7 of the CEN). Hard copy / offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 15-05-2026 to 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs.). Candidates must first create an account on the RRB portal. Those who created an account for CENs notified in 2024/2025 should use the same credentials. Details filled in the "Create an Account" form (including mobile number, email ID) and the chosen RRB cannot be modified at any stage after account creation. Candidates can apply to only one RRB and submit only one application - multiple applications to the same or different RRBs will result in rejection of all applications and debarment from future RRB/RRC exams. Aadhaar or DigiLocker authentication is strongly advised during account creation for a smoother recruitment process. A live photograph is captured during the online application; pre-existing photographs are not accepted. No documents need to be uploaded at application stage (except signature and SC/ST certificate for free travel pass, if applicable).

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 128 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Recruitment 2026 for 128 posts of Senior Resident. Candidates with DNB, Master of Dental Surgery, MS/MD, M.Ch, DM Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 28-05-2026, and ends on 30-05-2026. For detailed information please visit ESIC official website, esic.gov.in.
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident under Residency Scheme (3 Years Tenure) - Clinical, Non-Clinical, and Super Specialty
basic_details.application_mode: Offline - Application Form (Annexure-I) and Verification Slip (Annexure-II) to be submitted at the time of Walk-in-Interview

age_limit.age_details: Contractual - Initially 1 year, extendable up to a total of 3 years subject to satisfactory performance

qualification.education_qualification: DNB, Master of Dental Surgery, MS/MD, M.Ch, DM

selection_process: Walk-in-Interview (with document verification)
how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in-Interview recruitment. There is no online application process. Candidates must appear in person at the Walk-in-Interview on the scheduled date for their respective department/specialty. Candidates must report between 09:30 AM and 10:30 AM at the Academic Block, 2nd Floor, ESI-PGIMSR & ESIC Medical College, Joka, Kolkata – 700104 for document verification. Candidates reporting beyond 10:30 AM will NOT be considered. At the time of the interview, candidates must submit the completed Application Form (Annexure-I) and Verification Slip (Annexure-II) along with all original documents and one set of self-attested copies.

basic_details.job_title: Coal India MT Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 276 Management Trainee Posts
basic_details.short_information: Coal India Recruitment 2026: 276 Management Trainee vacancies through GATE 2025. Apply online from 8 May to 7 June 2026 at coalindia.in.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via CIL Website - coalindia.in > Career with CIL > Jobs at Coal India)

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E

salary_details.pay_scale: E-1 Grade: Rs. 60,000 - 1,80,000/- (Initial Basic Pay: Rs. 60,000/- per month during training period)

selection_process: GATE-2025 Score based shortlisting + Documents Verification (DV) + Initial Medical Examination (IME)

Candidates are advised not to wait until the last date and to register and submit their application well within time. No modifications are allowed after the online application form is submitted. If more than one application is received from a candidate, the most recent/current application will be considered as final.
